displayTitle: The Story of the Faithful Wookiee (Little Golden Book)
synopsis: A retelling of the animated segment from the 1978 *Star Wars Holiday Special*, in the Little Golden Book format. While on a mission to rescue Han Solo, the Rebel hero Luke Skywalker, the droids C-3PO and R2-D2, and the faithful Wookiee Chewbacca encounter a mysterious armored stranger who offers to help them. The story asks whether this newcomer, the bounty hunter Boba Fett, is truly a friend or a foe.
title: The Story of the Faithful Wookiee (Little Golden Book)
